name: Tree Service
title: AI Tools for Tree Service Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for tree services — capture storm-season calls, quote from photos, and follow up on every estimate. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: A storm drops a tree on a roof and the phone doesn't stop. Routine trimming gets quoted between emergencies. We build the tools that catch the surge and keep the regular work moving.
drains: Storm-driven emergency calls flooding in faster than you can answer
Trimming and removal estimates from vague phone descriptions
Quotes that go quiet with no follow-up
The owner doing dispatch, quoting, and climbing all at once

tools.title: Storm-surge call catcher
tools.body: When a storm drives a flood of calls, the assistant answers every one, flags true emergencies — a tree on a structure — for immediate dispatch, and books the rest.

tools.title: Photo-quote assistant
tools.body: Customers send photos of the tree; the assistant gives a price range from your pricing for trimming or removal and books the job or a site visit.

tools.title: Estimate follow-up assistant
tools.body: Every open estimate gets a well-timed nudge, so larger removal and lot-clearing jobs don't slip away.

tools.title: Morning crew brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's jobs in route order, crew and equipment assignments, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A tree service company after a regional windstorm.
cases.before: A surge of emergency calls overwhelmed the office; many never got a call back.
cases.after: Every storm call answered and triaged — emergencies dispatched, the rest booked.
cases.impact: Representative result: a far higher share of storm-week calls converted into jobs.

cases.context: A tree service with no estimate follow-up.
cases.before: Removal quotes went out and were forgotten if the customer didn't reply.
cases.after: Every open estimate followed up automatically until the customer decides.
cases.impact: Representative result: more higher-ticket removal jobs closed from the same leads.

faq.q: Can it handle a storm surge of calls?
faq.a: Yes — that's a primary reason tree services come to us. The call catcher scales instantly and flags true emergencies, like a tree on a house, for immediate dispatch.
For trimming and straightforward removals, yes — customers send photos and get a price range from your pricing. Complex or hazardous jobs get a site visit booked.

faq.q: Will it work with my software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of whatever you use to schedule crews and track jobs.
